Name: System Monitor
Description: Live CPU & memory graphs (Windows 10 Task Manager style) across your deck keys.

Actions.Name: System Monitor
Actions.Tooltip: Live CPU/RAM graph — place on a block of keys

Localization.Grid: Grid (same on every key of one graph)
Localization.SysmonHint: Each key draws the whole graph and shows its own cell, so keys never interfere. For ONE graph across several keys, set the same Columns, Rows and Metric on every key of it, and give each key its This column / This row (0-based, top-left = 0,0). Leave them empty for auto (use the key's own position). A single key with Columns=Rows=1 just shows a full graph. Use one block for CPU and another for Memory.
